name: zutil_zrdr_free_node_pool
description: zUtil_ZRDR_FreeNodePool pops and frees every preallocated ZRDR node, destroys the free-pool list, and clears the pool pointer.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for _zUtil_ZRDR_FreeNodePool at 0x48c890 still fails: 29 unmasked mismatches, 28 relocation bytes masked, 2 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 67 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.
The native smoke verifies preallocated node-pool cleanup and global pointer clearing.
